2026-07-08T20:57:11.705+05:30 WARN 25284 --- [auth-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-07-08T20:57:14.175+05:30 INFO 25284 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists email_verification_tokens cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists login_attempts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists otps cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists password_reset_tokens cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists permissions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists refresh_tokens cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists role_permissions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_credentials cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_sessions cascade Hibernate: create table email_verification_tokens ( used boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), expiry_date timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table login_attempts ( success boolean not null, attempt_time timestamp(6), id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(50), email varchar(100) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table otps ( used boolean not null, code varchar(6) not null, created_at timestamp(6), expiry_date timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, identifier varchar(100) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table password_reset_tokens ( used boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), expiry_date timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table permissions ( created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null unique, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens ( revoked boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), expiry_date timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token varchar(500) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table role_permissions ( permission_id uuid not null, role_id uuid not null, primary key (permission_id, role_id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null unique, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_credentials ( account_non_expired boolean not null, account_non_locked boolean not null, credentials_non_expired boolean not null, enabled boolean not null, is_deleted boolean not null, version integer, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, phone varchar(20) unique, email varchar(100) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( role_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, primary key (role_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table user_sessions ( active boolean not null, login_time timestamp(6), logout_time timestamp(6), id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(50), device varchar(255), location varchar(255), user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists email_verification_tokens add constraint FK60x00ygcy9nca96dsdi9xo0n8 foreign key (user_id) references user_credentials Hibernate: alter table if exists password_reset_tokens add constraint FK4e664r5ey7ghwuux5tp6phhi5 foreign key (user_id) references user_credentials Hibernate: alter table if exists refresh_tokens add constraint FK2jjwjokbv24hq6j6cem7wucy6 foreign key (user_id) references user_credentials Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKegdk29eiy7mdtefy5c7eirr6e foreign key (permission_id) references permissions Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKn5fotdgk8d1xvo8nav9uv3muc foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKh8ciramu9cc9q3qcqiv4ue8a6 foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKqin6aw0mf2bud9ko2gb1rm15j foreign key (user_id) references user_credentials Hibernate: alter table if exists user_sessions add constraint FK9tv0vh18saqithl2pip3gqkuv foreign key (user_id) references user_credentials 2026-07-08T20:57:14.339+05:30 INFO 25284 --- [auth-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-07-08T20:57:17.025+05:30 WARN 25284 --- [auth-service] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-07-08T20:57:20.343+05:30 INFO 25284 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.s.auth.AuthServiceApplicationTests : Started AuthServiceApplicationTests in 16.783 seconds (process running for 19.142)
